scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ "$APP_TARGET" = "mip" ]; then turbo run build --filter=mip; else turbo run build --filter=bilan-carbone; fi'
scripts.seed: yarn workspace bilan-carbone prisma db seed
scripts.db:generate: rm -rf packages/db-common/src/generated/prisma && yarn workspace @abc-transitionbascarbone/db-common run db:generate
scripts.compile:publicodes: sh -c 'set -e; if [ "$APP_TARGET" = "mip" ]; then yarn install --production=false --non-interactive --cwd packages/publicodes-packages/publicodes-mip && (cd packages/publicodes-packages/publicodes-mip && yarn compile); else for dir in packages/publicodes-packages/publicodes-clickson packages/publicodes-packages/publicodes-count packages/publicodes-packages/publicodes-tilt; do (cd "$dir" && yarn compile); done; fi'
scripts.compile:publicodes-windows: for /d %d in ("packages\publicodes-packages\publicodes-*") do (@cd /d "%d" && yarn install && yarn compile && cd ..\..\..)
